rationale: Internal Go API inconsistency between DateTime method return types; no BSON spec rule violated.

Buffer allocation optimization for wire message reads; performance improvement, no spec rule involved.
BSON decode fails for user-defined enum types (int32 alias); implementation gap, no specific BSON spec rule violated.
Deprecate eval helpers per DRIVERS-460; API deprecation, not a spec nonconformance or test infrastructure update.
Cursor.Next must call getMore in loop until document available; spec requires handling empty batch with non-zero cursorId.

Add missing BinaryOK method to bson.Value; API completeness, not a spec requirement.

maxAwaitTimeMS broken for change streams and tailable cursors; spec requires sending it on getMore, not initial request.
SSL option processing incorrectly sets SSLCaFileSet on empty string; implementation bug with no contradicted spec rule.
BSON decoding date into time.Time fails due to type mismatch; implementation bug in codec, not a BSON spec violation.
Add BytesValueReader/Writer interfaces for BSON bytes handling; internal API addition, not a spec deviation.

Use new BSON codecs in mongo package; internal refactor enabling configurable Registry, no spec rule violated.
bson.Value.Equal incorrectly includes keys in value comparison; internal Go API bug, no BSON spec rule violated.
Implement improved Sessions API; thin description, general feature implementation task, not a specific nonconformance.
Implement ExtJSON reader using custom JSON parser; internal architecture implementation, no spec deviation.
bson.EC.Time zero value inconsistent with encoder; internal API design bug, no BSON spec rule violated.

writeSelector missing LatencySelector; spec requires applying localThresholdMS to all server selectors including writes.
Nil pointer not checked before encoding; implementation safety bug, no specific BSON spec rule about nil pointers.
Connection string options override programmatic options; spec requires last-one-wins with programmatic options taking precedence.
Separate cursor options from command options for cleaner API; internal refactor after CRUD spec decoupling.
Nil context to cursor.Close causes panic leading to deadlock; implementation safety bug, no spec rule violated.

ListCollections filter accepts wrong type; internal Go API ergonomics fix, no spec rule violated.
Add license headers to all source files; legal/compliance task, no spec or behavior involved.

Change handling of network errors during handshake; thin description, insufficient detail to confirm specific SDAM spec rule violated.
Scope and design planning for improved BSON support; design task, not a spec nonconformance or driver bug.
